_instructions: Antigravity (agy) hooks config. INSTALL TO ~/.gemini/config/hooks.json (the backend-synced path — NOT ~/.gemini/antigravity-cli/hooks.json, which the TUI displays but never executes). Replace /ABS/PATH with the absolute path to your pi-agent-observability clone, and remove this _instructions key. agy passes no event name on stdin, so each command passes it as the first argument.
